user_system_path: Workday Presence runtime map + current-path Supabase receipts
allowed_files_raw: Control-plane files plus the current Workday Presence seed receipt path and source-readiness live readout.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema work, no legacy daily-brief product revival, no Slack transport changes, no dashboard redesign, no broad cron cleanup.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run build
acceptance_condition: Current Workday Presence paths write explicit current-path receipts; source-readiness ignores legacy daily-brief rows as current product truth; GitHub truth records the runtime map.
stop_condition: Stop when issue #341 has a PR with proof and GitHub/runtime-map receipt, or the exact live-path blocker is posted.
next_command: Rebase codex/341-runtime-map-current-path onto post-#340 main, wire one current receipt path, open PR.
